metadata.description: A set of custom Cursor plugins used by Isshin

plugins.name: starter-simple
plugins.description: Minimal plugin with rules and skills only

plugins.name: starter-advanced
plugins.description: Full-featured plugin with rules, skills, agents, commands, hooks, and MCP

plugins.name: learning-output-style
plugins.description: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: Git workflow slash commands for commit, push, PR creation, and gone-branch cleanup

plugins.name: fde-north-skills
plugins.description: FDE skills for triaging and fixing North bugs: Linear investigation, Playwright reproduction, support bundle analysis, and end-to-end fix validation
